game_name: Space Quest IV: Roger Wilco and the Time Rippers

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Ms. Astro Chicken Flight Segment
special_mechanics.description: Embedded arcade game with flying chicken protagonist. Player controls chicken flight, drops eggs on enemies (flying squirrels, windpumps, hunters, dogs) to immobilize and score points.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). This is a narrative adventure game with point-and-click interface. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but contains no quantitative physics parameters, movement speeds, gravity values, or sub-pixel precision data. Physics parameters typical of adventure games are not documented.
